Our Services

Everything Your Car Needs

Logbook services to pink slips, blue slips to diagnostics — all under one roof in Taree.

Logbook Servicing

Keep your new car warranty intact. We follow manufacturer schedules and stamp your logbook.

General Servicing & Repairs

Oil changes, filters, belts, hoses — regular maintenance that keeps your car running reliably.

Brakes

Pads, rotors, callipers, brake fluid — we won't let you drive away on unsafe brakes.

Diagnostics

Modern scan tools to read fault codes and pinpoint exactly what's wrong — no guesswork.

Air Conditioning

Regas, repairs, and full AC service. Stay comfortable on those hot Taree summers.

Batteries & Electrical

Battery testing, replacement, and electrical fault-finding for all vehicles.

Pink Slips NSW Auth.

Annual safety inspection required for NSW rego renewal. Fast, reliable, and done right.

Blue Slips (AUVIS) NSW Auth.

Need to register an unregistered vehicle or bring rego in from interstate? We're an authorised AUVIS inspection station.
View all 13 services

The Process

Getting Your Car Fixed Is Simple

No stress, no confusion, no hidden extras. Three steps and you're done.

01

Book Your Service

Book online, call us on (02) 6552 6131, or send a message — whatever suits you. We'll confirm a time that fits your schedule.

02

Drop It Off

Bring your car to 16 Albert Lane, Taree. We'll assess it, call you with a clear quote before we start — no surprises.

03

Pick It Up Fixed

We'll call you when it's done. Your car is fixed properly, you know exactly what was done and why, and you're back on the road.

Book Now — (02) 6552 6131

Why Choose Us

The Taree Mechanic That Does It Right

We built this workshop on one principle: do the job properly and treat people with respect.

Family Owned & Operated

We're not a franchise. We're a local Taree family business. When you deal with us, you deal with the people who actually work on your car.

Straight Talk, No Surprises

We tell you what's wrong, what it'll cost, and what can wait. No inflated job sheets. No pressure. Just honest advice from people who know cars.

Latest Diagnostic Equipment

Modern cars need modern tools. Our diagnostic equipment reads the same data as the dealer — without the dealer price tag.

Warranty-Safe Logbook Servicing

We service to manufacturer specifications and stamp your logbook — so your new car warranty stays exactly where it should be.

★★★★★ Rated 5 stars by Taree locals — See Google Reviews

What Our Customers Say

Real People. Real Reviews.

Don't take our word for it — here's what Taree locals say about us.

★★★★★
"Finally a mechanic that just tells you straight. Brought my Corolla in for a service and they called before doing anything extra. Honest quote, no drama. Back on the road the same day."
S
Sarah M.
Toyota Corolla · Taree
★★★★★
"Had an urgent brake issue and they fit me in first thing. Fixed properly, price was fair, and they explained exactly what was wrong. Couldn't ask for more from a local workshop."
D
Dave R.
Ford Ranger · Taree
★★★★★
"Used to dread taking my car to the mechanic — always felt like I was being taken advantage of. Not here. They showed me exactly what needed doing and what could wait. Trust is everything."
M
Michelle T.
Mazda CX-5 · Old Bar
★★★★★
"Got a pink slip done quickly and they spotted a few other things that were getting close to needing attention. Warned me without pressuring me. That's the kind of place I keep coming back to."
T
Tom K.
Holden Colorado · Wingham
★★★★★
"Logbook service was done exactly to the manufacturer specs. They stamped my logbook, showed me the items they checked, and the price matched what they quoted. Simple as that."
K
Karen B.
Hyundai Tucson · Taree
★★★★★
"Air con wasn't keeping up in summer. Dropped it off, they found a small leak, repaired and regassed it same day. Ice cold now. Brilliant service, will absolutely be back."
J
James L.
Toyota HiLux · Forster
See all our Google reviews ★★★★★
